prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-DIYKIT-PARENT Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Cityscape Playmat Toy Vehicle Felt Floor Map Activity Set, 31 x 27 inch Childrens Rug with 8pc Emergency Vehicles, Boys Description: Calling all little firefighters in training. This fun fire truck themed playset includes one play mat, two fire truck vehicles and five traffic signs. Toddlers and little kids will love zooming over town to the next emergency or rescue mission with the friction powered fire truck toys.

Featuring two fun, fire truck toys, these fire rescue themed vehicles are easy to play with once kids learn and understand the mechanics of friction power. With a simple pull, little ones can crime fight all across the city from one accident to the next. In addition to the two fire truck toys, this play set comes with an awesome felt play mat. Measuring 31 x 27 inches (80cm x 70cm), the felt play mat features a sprawling urban city map with lots of pit stops for little firefighters to drive to; when playtime is over, the floor mat folds up neatly for tidy storage.

And, not only will your little hero be thrilled conjuring up lots of imaginative pretend play fire rescue scenarios, kids will also be developing their fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination and dexterity while maneuvering the fire truck toys, other toy cars and traffic signs across the play mat. A great value toy car playset kids can use in conjunction with other toys too, sure to spark imagination and playtime creativity.

Let the fire rescue missions begin.

Recommended Ages: 3+

Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts Search Terms: floor mat toddlers playroom pretend play cosplay learning kids red fire truck boys toy toddler gifts christmas 2025 small child fun activity Features: - TOY CITYSCAPE PLAYMAT: Recreate the hustle and bustle of a busy fire station with this unique fire rescue playset! Featuring two levels, a helicopter pad and lots of accessories, this is an awesome gift for kids and toddlers who love DIY, building and creating, as some assembly is required before rescue missions can begin - AWESOME URBAN FELT ACTIVITY MAT: Measuring 31 x 27 inches (80cm x 70cm), this super fun felt play mat features a sprawling urban city map with lots of pit stops for little firefighters to visit; and, when playtime is over, the play mat folds up neatly for tidy storage and playroom organization - HOURS OF EXTENDED FUN: Endless pretend play possibilities, your little birthday firefighter can maneuver their fire rescue vehicles throughout the fire station, using the outlined roads to quickly head out on an emergency call; compatible with types of toy vehicles, kids can incorporate other toy cars or trucks for endless pretend play possibilities - URBAN CITY TOY CARS PLAYSET: Calling all little firefighters in training! This fun fire rescue themed playset includes one play mat, two fire truck vehicles and five traffic signs; kids will love zooming all over town to the next fire emergency with the friction powered fire truck toys! - EDUCATIONAL LEARNING TOYS: Not only will your little one be occupied for hours with this fire station firefighter playset, they'll be engaging in crucial early educational activities like working their fine and gross motor skills, as well as cognitive problem solving development through these imaginative pretend play sessions === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
